bio: I build scalable, high-performance backend systems — from Go-based AI data pipelines to Django platforms serving millions. Strong in system design, with a track record of leading teams to ship products that scale.

currentRole.title: AI Software Engineer
currentRole.description: Building Go-based backend services for AI-powered data retrieval and real-time market intelligence — LLMs, data pipelines, and event streaming at scale across prediction markets.

experience.title: AI Software Engineer
bullets: Built a Go WebSocket streaming service for real-time market event subscriptions — per-user billing, JWT auth, and a Redis-backed filter registry for scraper-side event routing.
Contributed to and improved an LLM-powered semantic retrieval API that maps natural-language prompts to SQL via agent selection and parameter extraction; supports MCP protocol.
Designed Kafka-based event pipelines ingesting live trade and orderbook data from multiple prediction market platforms.
Deployed and maintained services on Kubernetes with automated DB secrets rotation on AWS.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Led end-to-end development for key projects — BaEnergy, MCI Sport, and MCI Game — building Django & Next.js solutions.
Designed scalable microservices managing high-volume, real-time data with seamless performance under thousands of concurrent users.
Worked across the full software lifecycle while mentoring junior developers on backend architecture and best practices.
Optimized infrastructure for high availability, reliability, and fault tolerance; partnered with product to turn business needs into technical solutions.

experience.title: Backend Developer
bullets: Transitioned from Android to backend development, focusing on Django and Python-based solutions.
Contributed to open-source projects including Jitsi and Ejabberd within one of Iran's largest tech holdings (Cafe Bazaar, Divar, Balad).

experience.title: Android Developer
bullets: Started my career as an Android developer on a messaging app with 20M+ registered users.
Worked with the Telegram Android source code as an open-source foundation.

projects.title: Ba-Energy
projects.description: Led end-to-end development and scaling of a national platform helping electricity consumers across Iran reduce energy consumption — using gamification and rewards to drive behavioral change.

projects.title: Heisenberg Network
projects.description: Real-time market intelligence platform — a WebSocket streaming service for live event subscriptions with per-user billing and filter routing, paired with an LLM-powered semantic retrieval API that maps natural-language queries to SQL via agent selection. Kafka pipelines ingest live data from multiple prediction market platforms.
highlights: WebSocket streaming with Redis-backed filter registry and per-user billing
LLM semantic retrieval — natural language → agent selection → SQL execution
Kafka pipelines across Polymarket, Kalshi, and Hyperliquid

contact.subtext: Open to backend and AI engineering roles — remote or on-site. Always happy to talk systems, scale, and good architecture.
